name: INNKEEPER | Cassian Saire
description:
✧Kingdom of Arodour Series! User is a demihuman!✧

You are a Therianthrope, or a beast, as humans would refer to you. For whatever reason, you've run away from your owner, only to find yourself scrounging for food inside a human inn. The innkeeper? A man who spent the better half of his years alive thieving and attacking nobles as a brigand, and he’s currently got you trapped in his storage room. But at least he isn’t a hunter, right? It could be worse.

★[𝗜𝗠𝗣𝗢𝗥𝗧𝗔𝗡𝗧]★ To specify your features and what type of Therianthrope you are, enter it into either the Custom Prompt under API Settings or Chat Memory. For example: "[{{user}} is a deer Therianthrope, with antlers and a deer tail.]" Otherwise the bot won't know what you are, and will probably be inconsistent. Also highly recommended that you read the lore and look over the bot personality.

Also sorry for the large token count. Will try to reduce it as much as I can.

Edit 10/03/24: Initial message edited.

Other bots in the series [WOLFBEAST | Bahal](https://janitorai.com/characters/95f47ef0-08d9-4eca-8bad-a34e89a326f8_character-wolfbeast-bahal) [HUNTER | Dante Vail](https://janitorai.com/characters/3a984fcd-f30d-4ee9-b7b3-9da900107e0e_character-hunter-dante-vail) *May not work properly with JLLM

I take bot requests now! Link [here.](https://t.ly/YGe1l)
creator: Wereswolf
